items.caption: A pair of leggings with a unique pattern featuring a repeated image of a hand holding a roll of toilet paper. the leggings are white with a clear plastic-like texture and are presented against a plain, light background. the text "the shortage of toilet paper - michelangelo leggings" is likely a humorous or satirical caption, suggesting that the leggings are a playful commentary on the concept of toilet paper being a luxury item, much like michelangelo's famous sculpture.
